banned_patterns: devtool console logs as the main surface
centered hero plus three equal cards

canvas_hero.contrast: dark analytics field constrained behind solid metric cards
canvas_hero.fallback: 2D canvas ordered dither, then inline SVG ordered dither field
canvas_hero.quantization: in-shader Bayer 4x4 quantized posterized solid cells
canvas_hero.reduced_motion: draw one static frame and stop
canvas_hero.tiers: WebGL -> 2D canvas ordered dither -> inline SVG ordered dither

button.recipe: Compact mono-label action with dark field, one mint accent, visible focus, and no glow.

input.recipe: Dense 40px filter input with 1px rule, 4px radius, and explicit focus outline.

nav.recipe: Sticky operational header with metric timestamp, scope tabs, and hairline separation.

section.recipe: Information-dense analytics sections: KPI tiles, ordered-dither heatmap, dense table, and compact legends.

surface.recipe: Dark matte panels separated by hairlines and ring shadows; chart depth is stepped solid/dither cells only.

dek: KPI tiles, dense records, and stepped cells keep the analytics surface legible without a console log metaphor.
Every value has a label, every bin is countable, and the status legend names the scale before color does.
The page stays calm under density: dark field, mint accent, hairline separators, and ordered dither charts.
empty_state: Every metric row is visible before script runs; no chart waits for hover.
No cell is empty: each bin carries a label, state, and value.
The table remains readable when motion is reduced.
gallery_a_body: Stepped solid cells mark each bin; no continuous tone is required.
Ordered dither creates the higher bands while labels keep the values readable.
The chart behaves like a table first and an image second.
gallery_b_body: The denser cells use Bayer texture and still expose their bin labels.
A single accent marks current exceptions without adding a second palette.
Every cell remains visible when motion is reduced.
gallery_c_body: Legend rows name the status, density, and action owner.
Solid fills and dither utilities replace chart gradients.
The reader can audit the data without hovering or waiting for script.
index_a_note: Four tiles, delta labels, and current state
index_b_note: Ordered texture and solid steps only
Twelve cells with visible bin labels
Density values are countable and captioned
index_c_note: Legend states with no hue-only meaning
masthead: The board shows where attention moved.
spec_c_value: Mint markers only for live exceptions

copy.dek: KPI tiles, dense records, and stepped cells keep the analytics surface legible without a console log metaphor.
copy.empty_state: Every metric row is visible before script runs; no chart waits for hover.
copy.gallery_a_body: Ordered dither creates the higher bands while labels keep the values readable.
copy.gallery_b_body: A single accent marks current exceptions without adding a second palette.
copy.gallery_c_body: The reader can audit the data without hovering or waiting for script.
copy.index_b_note: Twelve cells with visible bin labels
copy.index_c_note: Legend states with no hue-only meaning

anti_generic_rules: Use content-native layout families; never default to centered hero plus three equal cards.
Declare executable signature moves with CSS, preview markup, assert selectors, and source refs.
Use role and theory token names instead of component-colored tokens.
Keep one semantic accent; pictures or data dots may carry extra chroma, typography may not.
Use hard rules, stepped swatches, and real ordered dither instead of soft blended tonal effects.
Bind every family-* class to the archetype allowed_families list.

dither_policy.canvas_hero: If enabled, live hero fields must try WebGL first with domain-warped FBM/value-noise, read field/accent/ink palette tokens, and quantize with a Bayer 4x4 threshold inside the fragment shader. They must fall back to 2D canvas ordered dither and then inline SVG ordered dither, draw one static frame for reduced motion/coarse pointers, keep hero copy on solid AA-contrast cards, and use no CSS gradient functions.
dither_policy.implementation: Inline SVG pattern with stepped solid rect cells in a data URI.
dither_policy.summary: Tonal range must be solid stepped swatches or a real ordered/Bayer dither utility.

layout_grammar.cta_policy: One mint accent for live exception or primary action; all other status marks use text and solid/dither bins.
forbidden_compositions: centered hero plus three equal cards

name: Data Dashboard
purpose: a local MCP server that turns Apple Health data into clean JSON for AI agents

selected_motif.css: .dd-motif-source-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 5rem 1fr auto; gap: var(--s-12); align-items: center; padding: var(--s-12); background: var(--surface); box-shadow: var(--shadow-ring); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: var(--label-size); } .dd-motif-source-row strong { color: var(--accent); font-weight: var(--weight-strong); }
selected_motif.name: source-row

signature_moves.css: .dd-kpi-strip { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0,1fr)); gap: 1px; background: var(--rule); } .dd-kpi-strip span { display: grid; gap: var(--s-4); padding: var(--s-12); background: var(--surface); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: var(--label-size); color: var(--muted); } .dd-kpi-strip b { display: block; font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: var(--t-31); line-height: var(--lh-display-tight); color: var(--ink); font-weight: var(--weight-display); } .dd-kpi-strip span:last-child { background: var(--accent); color: var(--field); } .dd-kpi-strip span:last-child b { color: var(--field); }
signature_moves.move: KPI tiles carry label, value, delta, and status in compact cells; they are not generic cards.
signature_moves.name: dd-kpi-strip

signature_moves.css: .dd-dither-heatmap { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(6, minmax(0,1fr)); gap: 1px; background: var(--rule); } .dd-dither-heatmap > span { min-height: 58px; display: grid; align-content: end; padding: var(--s-8); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: var(--label-size); color: var(--ink); background-color: var(--surface); } .dd-dither-heatmap b { width: max-content; max-width: 100%; padding: 2px 5px; background: var(--field); color: var(--ink); border: 1px solid var(--rule); font-weight: var(--weight-ui); } .dd-dither-heatmap span:nth-child(5n) { background-color: var(--accent); color: var(--field); } .dd-dither-heatmap span:nth-child(3n) { background-color: var(--surface-raised); }
signature_moves.move: Heatmap cells are stepped solid fills or ordered Bayer dither utilities; there is no CSS gradient and no hue-only legend.
signature_moves.name: dd-dither-heatmap

signature_moves.css: .dd-status-ring { display: grid; grid-template-columns: auto 1fr auto; gap: var(--s-12); align-items: center; padding: var(--s-12); background: var(--surface); box-shadow: var(--shadow-ring); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: var(--label-size); color: var(--muted); } .dd-status-ring b { min-width: .75rem; min-height: .75rem; display: inline-grid; place-items: center; padding: 1px 4px; background: var(--accent); color: var(--field); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px var(--accent); font-size: 10px; line-height: 1; font-weight: var(--weight-ui); } .dd-status-ring strong { color: var(--ink); font-weight: var(--weight-strong); }
signature_moves.move: Depth is a crisp ring and hairline grid; status is named text plus one accent marker, not glow.
signature_moves.name: dd-status-ring
signature_moves.preview_markup: liveactive thresholdowner: ops desk

site_dek: HealthKite frames local MCP server that turns Apple Health data as an operations dashboard with named actions and readable records

themes.name: mint-terminal
themes.theory: Dark matte field, low-chroma panels, pale data ink, and one mint exception accent keep high-density analytics calm and precise.

themes.name: slate-instrument
themes.theory: Slate field and aqua accent preserve the single-signal rule while making dense tables and heatmap cells feel instrument-grade.

accent.theory: mint status accent for current exception, focus, and primary action only

focus-ring.theory: mint focus ring matches the one accent

ink.theory: pale green-white data ink for dark surfaces

muted.theory: cool muted labels that remain AA on dark field

rule.theory: pale hairline for dense grids and ring depth

status.theory: mint live marker, text-labeled and never hue-only

surface-raised.theory: raised instrument panel for table and chart modules

dither.chart_technique: ordered-dither and stepped solid cells only; no CSS gradient functions

elevation.technique: Hairlines and ring shadows only; chart hierarchy comes from solid cell steps and ordered dither.

motion.reduced_motion: one-frame state; no hidden first paint; data stays visible without motion

radius.rules: 2px dense cells, 4px controls, 6px maximum panels; never large SaaS cards.

families.display: 'IBM Plex Sans Condensed', 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif
families.mono: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace
